instruments.instrument_name: Prism Chamber / Red Team Lab MuranoOS
instruments.input: project source text and the named component `Red Team Lab MuranoOS`
instruments.operation: treats `Red Team Lab MuranoOS` as a room or workbench component that gives the project a usable surface rather than only a written description.
